description: Ion wasm call_ref safepoint omission - cross-instance function-reference calls needed an adjunct safepoint but not all LWasmCall nodes received one. The vulnerable lowering/codegen path in js/src/jit/Lowering.cpp and CodeGenerator.cpp could leave nursery values in wasm call descriptors untracked across a GC triggered by the call. When the callee or argument objects moved or were freed, the returning code used stale pointers, producing csectype-uaf crashes in wasm/GC traces. The fix emits the additional safepoint metadata for the affected wasm call_ref paths.
